parts.description: large red lattice/frame-like subassembly with long diagonal members, top mounting area, and lower vertical tail
green long narrow rail/side member with top cap and lower mounting tab
purple large panel/frame assembly with many longitudinal ribs
yellow long vertical strut/rail with top bracket and lower tip
green tray/deck panel assembly with many cross ribs and left latch/tab
red long left lower side linkage/rail assembly
red long right lower side linkage/rail assembly

step_analysis.action: Initial visible active assembly combines four major structural parts into a large base/body subassembly.
A new green deck/tray panel is attached to the previously built large body/frame subassembly shown now as a black-box red component.
Final assembly joins the earlier body/deck subassembly (now reused as a black-box component, geometry matching the overall product) with two long side linkage/rail assemblies, one on each side.
